description_long: This object is a compact desktop computer tower, commonly used in office or home environments. The front panel features a power button, USB ports, audio jacks, and an optical drive bay, all set within a matte black and dark gray chassis. The rear side is equipped with a power supply socket, multiple I/O ports including VGA, serial, USB, Ethernet, and audio connectors, as well as ventilation grilles for cooling. The top and side panels are solid, with the top showing four rubber feet, indicating it can be oriented horizontally or vertically. The overall construction is primarily metal with some plastic elements, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance. This type of device is typically found on desks, in offices, or in public computer kiosks in urban settings.
description: A compact desktop computer tower with a matte black and gray finish, featuring front-facing ports and a rear panel with multiple I/O connections and ventilation grilles.
description_view_0: The front view shows the power button, optical drive bay, USB ports, and audio jacks, all set in a matte black panel.
description_view_1: The top view displays a flat, solid gray surface with four rubber feet, indicating stability for horizontal placement.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the power supply socket, various I/O ports, and extensive ventilation grilles for cooling.
description_view_3: The side view presents a plain, solid gray panel with no visible features or openings.
